intro: A grand arena rises before you, its stone pillars worn by countless battles.
speaker: Tournament Master
introDialogue: Welcome, challenger, to the World Tournament!$Fifteen opponents await, from rookies to a Champion. Win battle after battle and your reward grade keeps climbing. Stop whenever you like to claim your prize, but push too far and you walk away with nothing. How far will you go?
title: World Tournament
description: A 15-round tournament of rising threat, from rookies to gym leaders, ghost challengers, and a Champion. After every win, CONTINUE to chase a higher reward grade (D up to EX) or CASH OUT to open a full reward shop locked to that grade. Survivors are patched up between rounds, but lose a battle and the prize is gone.

1.label: Enter the Tournament
1.tooltip:
(-) 15 back-to-back trainer battles
(+) Reward grade ramps from D to EX

2.label: Leave
2.selected: You step away from the arena.

reward: Tournament cleared at the {{tier}} grade! You pocket ₽{{money}}, and a full reward shop of that grade opens.
